central.regulation: CERC (Deviation Settlement Mechanism and Related Matters) Regulations, 2024
verified_notes: Deviation for a seller = actual injection minus scheduled generation per time block.
2024 DSM charges are linked to time-block market prices, not a fixed rupee/MWh figure.
CERC issued an order (2026) determining the value of 'X' for deviation computation for wind/solar sellers.
Some 2024 provisions were stayed by the Karnataka High Court on an NSEFI petition (2026).

state.regulation: KERC (Forecasting, Scheduling, Deviation Settlement Mechanism and related matters for Sellers of Wind, Solar and WS-Hybrid Generation Sources) Regulations

deviation_bands.band_note: The +/-15% band is a MODELLING parameter used to label dsm_agent_training.parquet and to structure recommendations. It is NOT an official KERC/CERC deviation percentage. The official solar 'X' band must be read from the current CERC/KERC order.

dsm_charges.reason: CERC DSM 2024 charges are linked to time-block market clearing prices and are under active amendment/litigation. No fixed rupee value is hardcoded. The app returns framework-only DSM recommendations (deviation band + direction) and does not compute rupee penalties until an official, current rate source is connected.

bescom_retail_tariff.reason: Retail slab rates change per annual KERC tariff order; not hardcoded to avoid stale/incorrect rupee values.
